SC2-ADRENAL_OVERLOAD.title: Adrenal Overload
SC2-ADRENAL_OVERLOAD.description: For the next [blue]2[/blue] combats, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Max Energy[/gold], [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold], and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
SC2-Overkill.title: Overkill
SC2-Overkill.description: Excess damage dealt by you to an enemy that died. (This does not include damage taken from debuffs.)
